Notice Of Defendant Horizon Lines, Llc'S Motion For Terminating Sanctions Against Plaintiff Ahmed Shamman
Off Calendar Feb-23-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Katharine Essick of Emard Danoff Port Tamulski & Walovich LLP (415)-227-9455 for Defendant; No appearance for Plaintiff.

Counsel for Defendant stipulated to the Judge Pro Tem ruling on the matter. The matter was not argued and the Court adopted the tentative ruling. DEFENDANT HORIZON LINES, LLC'S MOTION FOR TERMINATING SANCTIONS AGAINST PLAINTIFF AHMED SHAMMAN IS GRANTED. HIS WILFULL FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH LEGITIMATE DISCOVERY REQUESTS AND COURT ORDERS HAS SERIOUSLY PREJUDICE HORIZON'S ABILITY TO RESPOND AND DEFEND ITSELF. NO MONETARY SANCTIONS WILL BE IMPOSED. Order and judgment signed in open court.

Judge Pro Tem: Paul Renne; Clerk: R. Noguera; Not reported.
